query:
SELECT DISTINCT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.status
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.orderId = o.id
JOIN product_variants pv ON oi.variantId = pv.id
WHERE (pv.variantName LIKE '%测试%' OR pv.variantName LIKE '%test%' OR pv.variantName LIKE '%Test%' OR pv.variantName LIKE '%UI%' OR pv.variantName LIKE '%SKU%' OR pv.variantName LIKE '%验证%' OR pv.variantName LIKE '%Automation%')
AND pv.id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM product_variants WHERE variantName LIKE '%测试%' OR variantName LIKE '%test%' OR variantName LIKE '%Test%' OR variantName LIKE '%UI%' OR variantName LIKE '%SKU%' OR variantName LIKE '%验证%' OR variantName LIKE '%Automation%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 2) AS k)
ORDER BY o.id DESC;
command:

SELECT DISTINCT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.status
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.orderId = o.id
JOIN product_variants pv ON oi.variantId = pv.id
WHERE (pv.variantName LIKE '%测试%' OR pv.variantName LIKE '%test%' OR pv.variantName LIKE '%Test%' OR pv.variantName LIKE '%UI%' OR pv.variantName LIKE '%SKU%' OR pv.variantName LIKE '%验证%' OR pv.variantName LIKE '%Automation%')
AND pv.id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM product_variants WHERE variantName LIKE '%测试%' OR variantName LIKE '%test%' OR variantName LIKE '%Test%' OR variantName LIKE '%UI%' OR variantName LIKE '%SKU%' OR variantName LIKE '%验证%' OR variantName LIKE '%Automation%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 2) AS k)
ORDER BY o.id DESC;
